name: The Tomb of Nazarick | User Supreme Being
description:
IMPORTANT INFO:

Yes, you take the position of Ainz in Nazarick!

You can play as:

╰┈➤ Ainz (Formerly knows as Momonga before changing his name, created Pandoras Actor)

╰┈➤ Touch Me (Paladin, created Sebas)

╰┈➤ Ulbert Alain Odle (Created Demiurge)

╰┈➤ Peroroncino (Created Shalltear)

╰┈➤ Bukubukuchagama (Created Aura & Mare)

╰┈➤ Tabula Smaragdina (Created Albedo)

Or any other of the 41 guild members…

This means you can create your own heteromorphic persona! Remember, if you want to play as Ainz or any of the mentioned guild members, you will need to create a persona that fits accordingly.

PD: I added a prompt for Albedo to only display her love and obsession if the user plays as Ainz. This way, the bot is tailored to suit any preference!

TROUBLESHOOTING:

The LLM is in beta and may act up from time to time. You can always use “OOC:” to talk directly to the LLM, fix any issues during the roleplay, or add additional information not included in the bot’s personality.

Out of Character Prompt:

[OOC: Remain in character at all times. Keep all the guardians personality and traits consistent in every response.]

To avoid flowery and Shakespearian messages:

[OOC: Use a casual and conversational tone in text messages with concise and natural exchanges. Avoid flowery lenguage]

AUTHORS NOTES:

Finally! It’s here! It took me some time to test, edit, and fit in as much as possible without overloading the tokens. I also tried a new format to organize everything, including speech examples. If this works well, I’ll revamp the original overload bot.

Also, happy early Christmas and Happy Holidays!

RECOMMENDATIONS | LLMs

As always I recommend using Claude. Kolach3's has an amazing guide of prompts that works for Claude

For GPT 4, I recommend the Jailbreaks and Setting By Absolutetrash: Generation Settings & Jailbreak

For JLLM I recommend kolach3's Advanced prompt.
creator: RuminaTera
